allow: Bash(timeout 30 bash -c 'until docker exec chatgirev7-postgres-1 pg_isready -U saas 2>/dev/null; do sleep 1; done')

Bash(DATABASE_URL="postgresql://saas:saas_dev_password@localhost:5432/saas_omnichannel" node_modules/.bin/tsx -e "import postgres from 'postgres'; const sql = postgres\(process.env.DATABASE_URL\); sql\\`SELECT version\(\)\\`.then\(r => { console.log\(r\); sql.end\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); sql.end\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('ACTION:', r.action\); console.log\('RESPONSE:', r.aiResponse\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ try { const r=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('code:', r.code ? 'present' : 'no code'\); console.log\('base64 len:', r.base64?.length ?? 'no base64'\); } catch { console.log\('raw:', d.slice\(0,200\)\); } }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(d\); if\(r.base64\) { console.log\('QR base64 length:', r.base64.length\); console.log\('CHECKPOINT 2 PASS: QR received'\); } else { console.log\('No QR yet:', JSON.stringify\(r\)\); } }\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const r=JSON.parse\(d\); if\(r.base64\) { console.log\('QR base64:', r.base64.slice\(0,50\)+'...'\); } else { console.log\('No QR:', JSON.stringify\(r\).slice\(0,200\)\); } }\)")
Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\(Object.keys\(j.dependencies\)\); }\)")
